metadata.title: Obsession (12 Inch Remix Version)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:41.89] You are an obsession (You are an obsession)
[00:43.98] I cannot (I cannot sleep) sleep
[00:46.07] I am a possession (I am your possession)
[00:48.25] Unopened at your feet
[00:50.40] There's no balance (There is no balance)
[00:52.53] No equality (No equality)
[00:54.64] Be still (Be still)
[00:55.76] I will not (I will not) accept defeat (accept defeat)
[00:58.79] I will have you
[01:00.48] Yes, I will have you
[01:02.70] I will find a way and I will have you
[01:06.69] Like a butterfly
[01:08.86] A wild butterfly
[01:10.84] I will collect you and capture you
[01:15.19] You are an obsession
[01:17.10] You're my obsession
[01:19.23] Who do you want me to be
[01:21.20] To make you sleep with me?
[01:23.46] You are an obsession
[01:25.69] You're my obsession
[01:27.57] Who do you want me to be
[01:29.69] To make you sleep with me?
[01:32.44] I feed you I drink you
[01:34.40] My day and my night
[01:36.51] I need you I need you
[01:38.69] By sun or candlelight
[01:41.41] You protest; you want to be
[01:44.92] Safe, oh, (there's no alternative) there's no alternative
[01:48.70] Your face appears again
[01:50.53] I see the beauty there
[01:53.05] But I see danger
[01:55.30] Stranger beware
[01:57.72] Of circumstance in your naked dreams
[02:01.12] Your affection is not what it seems
[02:05.55] You are an obsession
[02:07.42] You're my obsession
[02:09.76] Who do you want me to be
[02:11.50] To make you sleep with me?
[02:13.89] You are an obsession
[02:15.75] You're my obsession
[02:18.08] Who do you want me to be
[02:20.00] To make you sleep with me?
[02:57.25] My fantasy (My fantasy) has turned to madness (has turned to madness)
[03:00.74] And all my goodness (and all my goodness) has turned to badness (has turned to badness)
[03:04.84] My need to possess you has consumed my soul
[03:09.94] My life is trembling; I have no control
[03:13.64] I will have you
[03:15.18] Yes, I will have you
[03:17.44] I will find a way and I will have you
